title: World Templates
description: This mod adds the ability to download and create worlds from world templates within the game.
body:
# World Templates

This mod lets you download and create worlds directly from world templates inside the game, just like in Bedrock Edition! No more manually dragging and dropping ZIP files to download worlds.

## Features
- **Seamless Downloading:** Download custom world templates directly from the world selection menu.
- **Template Customization:** Adjust template settings before creating your world. Change the Game Mode, Difficulty, and Cheats using a vanilla-style settings menu.
- **World-Specific Resource Packs:** Keep your global resource pack list organized. Templates can define resource packs that automatically enable the second you join the world and disable the moment you leave.

---

![World Templates Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mXLZc66w/images/78adefdc05b043b77ea5db0b381a036e37fb8585.png)

Select World Template screen with the [Legacy Worlds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-worlds) resource pack enabled.
